subcodes.first_line: O Servant of the Spirit! The remembrance of thy Lord's mercy hath in truth been sent down. Verily, He remembereth thee through His bounty, and His favor hath ever rested upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س ذکر رحمه ربک قد کان بالحق منزولا انه یذکرک بفضل من عنده ان فضله کان علیک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
